channel.title: Explorer on QRL Ecosystem Index
channel.description: Recent content in Explorer on QRL Ecosystem Index

item.title: ZondScan
item.description:
: - testnet tags: - explorer - zond - validators title: ZondScan twitter: "" updated: “2026-06-09”

ZondScan is a DigitalGuards block explorer for the QRL Zond network. It provides a web interface for exploring blocks, transactions, smart contracts, validators, addresses, and network activity.

The project is open source and built with a Next.js frontend,
